variants.title: Donaldson P550808 Fuel Cartridge
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P550808 Fuel Cartridge is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
specifications: Style: Fuel Cartridge, Efficiency 1: SAE J1985, Outer Diameter: 90.9 mm, Length: 100.1 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: SAE J1985

variants.title: Mann Filter WK 820/1 Fuel Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P550808
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter WK 820/1 Fuel Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P550808
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER fuel filters remove unwanted and damaging dirt particles from the fuel and thus prevent possible damage. Thanks to the highest degree of separation and sealing, the fuel filter ensures functional reliability and optimum protection during the entire maintenance interval.
specifications: Style: Fuel Filter, Dimension A: 86.0 mm, Dimension F: 10 mm, Dimension G: 8 mm, Dimension H: 100.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: SAE J1985, Outer Diameter: 90.9 mm, Length: 100.1 mm

variants.title: Fleetguard FF5802 Fuel Filter, In-Line | Replaces the Donaldson P550808
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard FF5802 Fuel Filter, In-Line | Replaces the Donaldson P550808
variants.description: Fleetguard® FF5802 spin-on fuel filter delivers superior performance using proven media technology, removing harmful contaminants. Fleetguard fuel filters ensure optimal fuel system protection to meet or exceed OEM specifications.
specifications: Style: Fuel Cartridge, Efficiency 1: SAE J1985, Outer Diameter: 90.9 mm, Length: 100.1 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: SAE J1985
